title: Creator Channel System
description: A reference-dependent four-cover system built around one recurring host, one thumbnail template, and modular category accents for a tech-business short-video channel.
creative_direction: Image 01 establishes the host identity and the reusable cover template: oversized face crop, bold hook zone, clean category stripe, and high-contrast thumbnail readability. Images 02-04 preserve the same host and system while swapping the story cue, accent graphic, and category signal.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04 so the same host identity, framing logic, and channel styling are preserved while the story angle changes.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Creator Channel System
en.description: A reference-dependent four-cover system built around one recurring host, one thumbnail template, and modular category accents for a tech-business short-video channel.

zh-CN.title: 创作者频道系列
zh-CN.description: 四张依赖参考图的频道封面系统，以同一主持人、统一模板和可切换栏目标签构成科技商业短视频频道。
